title: Welcome to my blog
text:
I’m starting this blog to share ideas and projects at the crossroads of digital scholarship and ocean heritage.
By day, I work in Digital Scholarship at the University of Southampton helping make library collections more open, accessible, and engaging. I also support ocean advocacy through digital work with the Ocean Decade Heritage Network.
This blog is a place for me to think out loud. Expect posts research communication, digital tools, maybe some code, and probably a few ocean-related tangents too.
All views here are my own.

title: About me
text:
I’m Kiki Kuijjer, I work in Digital Scholarship at the University of Southampton, focusing on 2D digitisation and helping people connect with library collections. I also manage digital engagement for the Ocean Decade Heritage Network, bringing together heritage, science communication, and ocean advocacy.
I help libraries, researchers, and cultural organisations improve their digital presence and communicate science effectively.
This website brings together my interests in digital scholarship and ocean heritage. I write about digital tools, research communication, and the intersections between culture, science, and the sea.
As a freelancer, I offer consultancy, social media management, website management, and science communication services.

title: Home
text:
Welcome 👋
I’m Kiki Kuijjer, a Digital Heritage & Engagement Consultant.
I help libraries, researchers, and cultural organisations digitise collections, improve their digital presence, and communicate science effectively.
Through my work at the University of Southampton and the Ocean Decade Heritage Network, I combine expertise in digital scholarship, social media, website management, and science communication to deliver clear, accessible, and engaging digital content.


Services

Freelance consultancy on digital engagement and science communication
Social media strategy, content creation, and management
Website updates, design support, and accessibility recommendations
Science communication and public engagement content



Latest Blog Posts
Stay updated with my thoughts on digital scholarship, heritage, and ocean science, and explore practical tips for improving online engagement.
